case_title: JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS LLC VS. MARIO TABILA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, (TRANSACTION ID # 100041947) SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TABILA, MARIO

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JEFFERSON CAPITAL SYSTEMS LLC AS TO DEFENDANT TABILA, MARIO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-02-2018
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100042703)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-20-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-24-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
